zh.lifeSummary: 當William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick於大約1459年出生在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安波爾維其可時，他的父親William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick16歲，母親Mariote De Hoppringill35歲。他和Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1503年5月30日在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安格雷布利其享年45歲。

nameMeanings.name: Borthwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the old barony of Borthwick, formerly Loquhariot (Midlothian) and possibly also from Borthwick (Roxburghshire). The placenames are from Old English bord ‘board, table’ + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick was born about 1459, in Borthwick, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick, was 16 and his mother, Mariote De Hoppringill, was 35. He had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick. He died on 30 May 1503, in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick est né environ 1459, à Borthwick, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Mariote De Hoppringill, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick. Il est décédé le 30 mai 1503, à Gorebridge, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick um 1459 in Borthwick, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick 16 und seine Mutter Mariote De Hoppringill 35. Er hatte mit Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 30. Mai 1503 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Gorebridge, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick è nato il circa 1459 nel Borthwick, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Mariote De Hoppringill, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick. Morì il 30 maggio 1503, nel Gorebridge, Midlothian, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwickが約1459年にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンボルスウィックで生まれた時，父William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwickは16歳，母Mariote De Hoppringillは35歳であった。彼はMargaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwickとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1503年5月30日にイギリススコットランドミドロスアンゴアブリッジで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick(이)가 대략 1459년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 볼스윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariote De Hoppringill(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1503년 5월 30일 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 고레브리지에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Borthwick 3rd Lord Borthwick родился около 1459 г. в местности бортвикк, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Borthwick 2nd Lord Borthwick было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariote De Hoppringill, 35. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Margaret Hay of Wester Hoprew, latterly Borthwick. Он умер 30 мая 1503 г. в местности горебридж, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
